title: 皐月賞の後に・最初の冠

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon wins the Satsuki Sho, and the
audience's fervor for her success grows even
wilder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She sets the Japanese Derby as her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At night, we catch sight of Rice Shower training
alone and telling herself that she'll catch up to
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon can't understand the reason for
her frustration and simply watches her, confused.
